column1: There are ________ apples on the plate. Take one.
There is ______ milk in the fridge. Can you buy some?
If you want to make pancakes, you need _______ eggs.
This boy isn't very popular at school. He's got very _______ friends.
Can you buy ______ bottles of water for me?
We have______ tomatoes, we can't cook tomato-soup.
My parents give me ______ pocket money every week, so I can buy something.
I only need ______ minutes to get ready.
There is ______ flour, we can't make pancakes.
We have ______ vegetables, we can't make a salad.
